zh.lifeSummary: 當Llewelyn ap Seisyll King Of Gwynedd Powys and Deheubarth於0980年出生在威爾士福林爾爾德藍時，他的父親Prince Seisyll ap Ednowain de Deheubarth43歲，母親Prawst verch Elise40歲。他和Angharad ferch Maredudd至少有1個兒子。他去世於1023年10月23日在他的家鄉享年43歲，埋葬在威爾士丹比爾崔福拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Llewelyn ap Seisyll King Of Gwynedd Powys and Deheubarth于0980年出生在威尔士福林爾爾德藍时，他的父亲Prince Seisyll ap Ednowain de Deheubarth43岁，母亲Prawst verch Elise40岁。他和Angharad ferch Maredudd至少有1个儿子。他去世于1023年10月23日在他的家乡享年43岁，埋葬在威尔士丹比爾崔福拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: Llewelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llywellyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

en.lifeSummary: When Llewelyn ap Seisyll King Of Gwynedd Powys and Deheubarth was born in 0980, in Rhuddlan, Flintshire, Wales, his father, Prince Seisyll ap Ednowain de Deheubarth, was 43 and his mother, Prawst verch Elise, was 40. He had at least 1 son with Angharad ferch Maredudd. He died on 23 October 1023, in his hometown, at the age of 43, and was buried in Pentrefoelas, Denbighshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Llewelyn ap Seisyll King Of Gwynedd Powys and Deheubarth est né en 0980, à Rhuddlan, Flintshire, Galles, son père, Prince Seisyll ap Ednowain de Deheubarth, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Prawst verch Elise, avait 40 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Angharad ferch Maredudd. Il est décédé le 23 octobre 1023, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Pentrefoelas, Denbighshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Llewelyn ap Seisyll King Of Gwynedd Powys and Deheubarth 0980 in Rhuddlan, Flintshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Prince Seisyll ap Ednowain de Deheubarth 43 und seine Mutter Prawst verch Elise 40. Er hatte mit Angharad ferch Maredudd mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 23. Oktober 1023 im Alter von 43 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Pentrefoelas, Denbighshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Llewelyn ap Seisyll King Of Gwynedd Powys and Deheubarth è nato il nel 0980 nel Rhuddlan, Flintshire, Galles, il suo padre, Prince Seisyll ap Ednowain de Deheubarth, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Prawst verch Elise, aveva 40 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Angharad ferch Maredudd. Morì il 23 ottobre 1023, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Pentrefoelas, Denbighshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Llewelyn ap Seisyll King Of Gwynedd Powys and Deheubarthが0980年にウェールズフリントシュアイアルハッドランで生まれた時，父Prince Seisyll ap Ednowain de Deheubarthは43歳，母Prawst verch Eliseは40歳であった。彼はAngharad ferch Mareduddとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1023年10月23日に故郷で43歳で死去し，ウェールズデンビグhシュアイアペントレフォエラスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Llewelyn ap Seisyll King Of Gwynedd Powys and Deheubarth(이)가 0980년 웨일스 플린츠히르 후들런에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Prince Seisyll ap Ednowain de Deheubarth(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Prawst verch Elise(은)는 40세였다. 그는 Angharad ferch Maredudd(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1023년 10월 23일 그의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 덴비그h실르 펜트레포라스에 묻혔다.

mg.Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom: Gwynedd, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Llewelyn ap Seisyll King Of Gwynedd Powys and Deheubarth nasceu em 0980, em Rhuddlan, Flintshire, Gales, seu pai, Prince Seisyll ap Ednowain de Deheubarth, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Prawst verch Elise, tinha 40 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Angharad ferch Maredudd. Ele faleceu em 23 de outubro de 1023, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Pentrefoelas, Denbighshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Llewelyn ap Seisyll King Of Gwynedd Powys and Deheubarth родился в 0980 г. в местности руддлан, флинцхир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Prince Seisyll ap Ednowain de Deheubarth было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Prawst verch Elise, 40. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Angharad ferch Maredudd. Он умер 23 октября 1023 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности пентрефоелас, денбаишир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Llewelyn ap Seisyll King Of Gwynedd Powys and Deheubarth nació en 0980, en Rhuddlan, Flintshire, Gales, su papá, Prince Seisyll ap Ednowain de Deheubarth, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Prawst verch Elise, tenía 40 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Angharad ferch Maredudd. Murió el 23 de octubre de 1023, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Pentrefoelas, Denbighshire, Gales.
